title: Decode Ways
hints: Consider how the number of ways to decode the string up to index i depends on the ways to decode it up to i-1 and i-2.
This structure suggests dynamic programming. Define dp[i] as the number of ways to decode the prefix s[0...i-1].
For each position, add dp[i-1] if the current digit is valid alone, and add dp[i-2] if the two-digit number ending there is between 10 and 26.
